description: Reality adjustment factors - CONSERVATIVE estimates incorporating all identified issues
data_source: Conservative estimates post-audit (IV/theta/execution issues). NOT yet calibrated with paper trading.

spread_costs.comment: Bid/ask spread as percentage of mid price (REALISTIC: moderate execution)

slippage_pct.comment: Average slippage beyond mid price as percentage (REALISTIC: with limit orders)

close_timing_penalty.comment: Additional cost from entering near market close (enter at 15:50 not 16:00)

pnl_adjustments.comment: Adjustment multipliers for backtest P&L assumptions by expiry type and ticker (REALISTIC)
pnl_adjustments.note: Backtest assumes +45% on wins. Reality = +45% * adjustment_factor - spread - slippage - close_timing - commission

1_day.comment: 1-day expiries: Tue->Wed, Thu->Fri (REALISTIC with good execution)

win_rate_adjustments.comment: Expected win rate degradation from backtest to reality (UPDATED: execution issues)

theta_decay_daily.comment: Daily theta decay as percentage of option value

recommendations.reason_avoid: Spread costs too high (10-15%), adjustment factors too low (0.09-0.24x)
